titleStmt.title: SII 22.32: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 32. (A.R. No. 32 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒSVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE FIRST PRĀKĀRA. TRIBH. RĀJARĀJADĒVA (III)-18th YEAR. (A.D. 1233-34)

summary.p: This gives a comprehensive list of the lamps which had been donated to the temple of Kālakāladēvar at Tirukkaḍavūr up to the 18th year of the king, and for which lands had been endowed at Maṇaṟkuṉṟu in the dēvadāna village Erukkāṭṭuchchēri by various persons. The list of the donors includes such names as (1) Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Perumāṉambiyār alias Pallavarāyar of Kārigai-kuḷattūr in Śiṟukuṉṟa-nāḍu of Āmūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, (2) Kūttāḍumdēvar alias Kaḷappāḷarāyar of Tiruveṇkāḍu, (3) Vēdavanamuḍaiyāṉ Ammaiyappaṉ of Paḻaiyaṉūr in Mēlmalai-Paḻaiyaṉūr-nāḍu of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, (4) Tillai nāyakaṉ Rājarājadēvaṉ of Kuṟṟālam in Paṭṭiṉakkūṟṟam of Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu, (5) Ādittaṉ Rājēndraśōḻanār Kārāṉai Viḻupparaiyar of Perunallūr and (6) Ādittaṉ Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyāṉ Vīrarājēndra Pallavaraiyar of Nāvalur, in addition to many others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ākkūrnāṭṭu tirukkaṭa vūruṭaiyār śrīkālakālatevar koyilil tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja tevaṟkku patineṭṭāvatu varai Erikiṟa tirunantāviḷakku caṉtirātittavaṟ cella Ittevar tevatāṉam Erukkāṭṭucceriyil maṇaṟkuṉṟu kalliyum kaḻi tūrttum palarum tiruttiṉa nilattāl Erikiṟa tirunu
ṉtāviḷakkukku Uḷvari jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Āmurk koṭṭattuc ciṟukunṟanāṭṭuk kārikaikkuḷattūrk kuḷattuḻāṉ tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉ perumāṉampiyārāṉa pallavarāyar tiruviḷakku Oṉṟarai tiruveṇ kāṭuṭaiyāṉ kūttāṭuntevarāṉa kaḷappāḷarāyar vaitta kaṟpūrat tiruviḷakku Oṉṟum meṟpaṭiyār tiruviḷakku Oṉṟum Āka vi
ḷakku jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu melmalaip paḻaiyaṉūrnāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūruṭaiyāṉ vetavaṉamuṭaiyā ṉammaiyappaṉ vaitta tiruviḷakku Iraṇṭu keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭup paṭṭiṉakkūṟṟattu kuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ tillaināyakaṉ rājarājatevaṉ tiruviḷakku Oṉṟu Iṭṭa kuttiviḷakku Oṉṟu ceṉṉimaṅkala muṭaiyāṉ cirāḷatevaṉ tillaināyakarāṉa kurukularā—
yar tiruviḷakku Oṉṟu perunallūruṭaiyāṉ Ātittaṉ rājentira coḻaṉārāṉa kārāṉai viḻupparaiyaṉ tiruviḷakku Oṉṟu nāvaluṭaiyāṉ Ātittaṉ tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉāṉa virarājentirap pallavaraiyar tiruviḷakku Iraṇṭu nāvalūruṭaiyāṉ A ṉaṉ Aṉpaṟkaraiciṉ tiruviḷakku Oṉṟu kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ toṅkalāṇṭāṉ nampiyāḻvāṉāṉa Aṅkarāyar tiruviḷakku Oṉṟu
pirāmaṇi poṟṟavaiyammai tiruviḷakku 3ntaa4pta caiyvacikāmaṇi nampi tiruviḷakku 1ntaupama�pta periyanaṅkai tiruviḷakku 1ntakama4kūṟuceyta Avaṉicuntarap pallavaraiyar tiruviḷakku 1a pālaiyūruṭaiyār tiruviḷakku 2 10 7va muṉaiyataraiyar viṭṭa nilattu tiruviḷakku 7 Aṭiyāṟkaṭiyān tiruviḷakku 2nta kūṟṟūr kiḻavaṉ tiruviḷakku 1nta
karaikkūṟu ceyta tillaiyāḻvār tiruviḷakku Uva Āṇṭappiḷḷai yāṇṭār tiruviḷakku 1 sahananātarāyar tiruviḷakku 1 vilāṭa rāyar tiruviḷakku 1 comattiyaṉ tevaṉ kalaiyaṉ tiruviḷakku 5 10 9 pirāmaṇi Uṭappiṟantāḷ tiru viḷakku n=tasamaṅapta neṟkuṟum pirāmaṇi namacivāyattammai tiruviḷakku 100 5 10 4nma Ulakuyyakkoṇṭa maturāṉtakaṉ tiruviḷa
kku n=taapta mokiliyaṉ kāṭaṉ tāyaṉ tiruviḷakku 1 cūriyatevapaṭṭaṉ tiruviḷakku 1 pirāmaṇi kāraikkālammai tiruviḷakku 1[va�] comattiyaṉ tevaṉ cinantiśvaraṉ tiruviḷakku 1ntamaṅapta tirunaṭṭap perumāḷ tiruviḷakku 1ṅa� Āṇṭār Īśvarar tiruviḷakku 1 Āṇṭār tiruppūvaṇamuṭaiyār tiruviḷakku 1 Akattiya tevar tiruviḷakku 1 nuḷaicci tiruveṇ
kāṭṭunaṅkai tiruviḷakku 1nta paṟṟamuṭaiyāṉ tiruviḷakku 1ama�pta maṉṉuvān tiruviḷakku 1 cāttanuṭaiyān cuvaraṉ maṇṭai tiruviḷakku 1sa4 cātta nuṭaiyāṉ cuvaraṉ centaṉ tiruviḷakku 1va Irukkai muṭi Āṇṭār tiruviḷakku 1 cāttaṅkuṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampalaveḷān tiruviḷakku 1va veṇkāṭa nampiyāṉa śrī māṟkeṇṭayaveḷāṉ tiruviḷakku 1sa Āṇṭār maruta
māṇikka kālār tiruviḷakku 1 paruttikkuṭaiyān kunṟaṉ Uruṭṭiya tiruvaṭi tiruviḷakku 1 Ākkūruṭaiyān viḷakku 1 Attiyūrāḻvān tiruviḷakku 1 veḷḷāṭṭi Umai naṅkai tiruviḷakku ntava� neṟkuṟum naṅkai tiruvammai tiru viḷakku 1 Iṭ Aiyan kuṟumpūrnāṭṭukkon tiruviḷakku 1i Iṭaiyaṉ paṉaiyūr nāṭṭukkon tiruviḷakku ntaṟu Iṭaiyan karumpaṟaikkaṭṭikkon tiru viḷakku
1vasamapta Iṭaiyan Aḷanāṭṭukkon tiruviḷakku vaupanma� Iṭaiyan nāyakaṉ tiruviḷakku n=taupama Iṭaiyaṉ maṇṭai tiruviḷakku I nāvican nampikkaṭiyān tiruviḷakku 1kama viyāpāri parateci tiruviḷakku 1 teyvanāyakap peraraiyan tiru viḷakku 1i Aruṅkaṟumperiyān tiruviḷakku 1 tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ tiruviḷakku 1 pirāmaṇi tirumāliṭaṅkoṇṭāḷ tiruviḷakku Iṟu maṇṭaiyāṇṭi Ammai
tiruviḷakku 1 ponmeynta nampi tiruviḷakku 1va Omayintaṉ paṭaiyan koṟṟaṉ tiruviḷakku n=ta catācivaṉ kumārapaṭṭaṉ tiruviḷakku 1 comattiyaṉ kalai yan centan tiruviḷakku 1 viyāpāri Uṟaiyūr Uṭaiyān tiruviḷakku n=ta paṉaṅkuṭaiyān tiruviḷakku I kaṭamaṅkalamuṭaiyān piṉṉaiennātān tiruviḷakku 1 nampirāṭṭiyār Avaṉimā—
teviyār tirunantāviḷakku puṟamāka viṭṭa velaṅkuṭiyāna jayaṅ koṇṭacoḻanallūr viḷakkāy Itukku talaimāṟu ceyta viḷakku 2 10 civap pirāmaṇar Upaiyam Erikkum tiruviḷakku 2
Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu Amparnāṭṭu Am vaṇṇaṉ māṭalaṉ Iravikulamāṇikkam Araṅkilāṭiyāṉa rājarājamaṅkalātarāyan tiruviḷakku Oṉṟu Irājātirājavaḷanāṭṭut tiruvintaḷūrnāṭṭu marutamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ malaimelmaruntiṉārāṉa vāṉavaṉ viḻupparayan tiruviḷakku 2
Iḷavaḷampākkiḻāṉ kuṉittāṉ tirunāvukkaracaṉ tiruviḷakku Oṉṟu veḷūr kiḻavar nāyakan tiruviḷakku Oṉṟu .
Digital edition of SII 22.32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
